storyInfo: Gordon Tannen's secretary finds Nasti and requests that Rhine Lab skip the pre-exhibition technical inspections. The two sides come to a compromise, and Nasti agrees to perform the inspections in the order that Tannen requested. Meanwhile, assistant researcher Sky Jagger shuts down a company by the name of Lucky Cystybeast.

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) Freeze.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The sound of rapid punching.

The incantation draws an invisible wall in midair, blocking every one of the Vouivre's punches. The letters abbreviating her alma mater, the Trimounts Institute of Technology, on her boxing gloves are soaked with sweat.
Finally, the Vouivre stops.
Phew—let's call it a day. Thanks for agreeing to be my practice partner, Nasti.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: We've only done half your normal routine.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It's time for you to go. Have you said goodbye to the others?
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Not yet. Maryam goes without saying; Muelsyse is in Kjerag, and I don't know the new directors of HR and Structural all that well yet.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: As for Justin Jr. and Ferdinand, I think it's better that those two see each other in private...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: They can give each other an audience to name drop fancy banquet guests, or rattle off a couple of fanciful theories that are this close to crowning a new king of science.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Besides, it's just a business trip.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: There are few things that require a business trip from the head of Engineering personally.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: The District has approved our application to consolidate resources for the Horizon Arc Project, and continue developing levitation technology based on the legacy of Galleria Stellaria.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: But they have also opened their doors to every tech firm in Columbia, designating an entire plate for the purpose.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Did you see the list of names? Administrators from the ATAO, and even Maylander.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Our proposal is now merely one of thousands. They're already showing as much respect as they could by allowing Rhine Lab to provide foundational engineering support for the plate.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Government officials, tech firm representatives... things will be very busy on the plate. You're not used to dealing with these things.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I haven't heard you complaining about anything... Control.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The Starpod is recovering, but the eyes cast up to the sky linger. When common sense is turned upside-down, what was once ignored has naturally become the center of attention.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Naturally? Since the announcement of the Special Loan Policy, one third of major enterprises have added an aerial operations department, and SMEs are climbing over one anther to jump on the 'sky fever' bandwagon.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I know what you're implying, but I'm not interested in political games.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Even if how things develop is out of our control, Rhine Lab must maintain the initiative as the original proponent, in order to protect what Kristen left behind.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: That's not so hard to understand.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Yes. Well, thanks for helping out.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: One more thing. Why did you hang a sign that says 'Components Control Section' outside your old office, instead of moving into Kristen's old room?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I'm used to this place.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Muelsyse asked the same question. She grabbed my arm and asked with watery eyes whether I made this choice to honor Kristen, to ensure there would always be a place for Kristen at the company.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I suppose you just feel more comfortable in your old place. You personally oversaw every little detail here, after all.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You were watching over my shoulder the whole time I was furnishing your office. You were even more OCD than Parvis was.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Rhine Lab is the same as it ever was.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: I wouldn't quite say that. At least staff who come looking for the Control will actually find her once in a while.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: ...I'm not sure you're the right person to say that.
attributes.name: Saria

attributes.content: Is this why you chose me for the trip?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Make a cut here. Yes, that's the right angle. That way, the branches of the main trunk will not be affected.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Test passed. Give it a tug for me before we pave it, Sky.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Next set. Light sensor performance, normal. Levitation attitude, stable. Energy input and output, check. This needs a tug, too.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Oh, and get the disassembly set from the toolbox for me as well.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Do you still need the high-speed screwdriver and multi-function wrench, then?
attributes.name: Sky?

attributes.content: Depends... huh? What happened to your voice?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I would love to help, but I have a scissor hanging from my buttons, and I'm holding five... trees? I really can't take any more.
attributes.name: Gentle Woman

attributes.content: Sorry, I'll get it. Did Sky leave?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: He told you three times that he was going to the levitation layer for inspections. You didn't acknowledge him at all.
attributes.name: Gentle Woman

attributes.content: You could have given me a heads-up.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The First Rule of Secretaries: Stand to one side and smile politely, only stirring when directed by your boss, and shut your ears when the conversation turns confidential.
attributes.name: Gentle Woman

attributes.content: I assure you I did not hear any of the figures or nouns that you just discussed, nor would I have understood a word of it.
attributes.name: Gentle Woman

attributes.content: I remember you now. You're from Administration—Gordon Tannen's secretary.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I'm flattered that you remember me, Director Lunorey.
attributes.name: Gentle Woman

attributes.content: My name is Mercia. You may call me Merry. Mr. Tannen would like to invite you to lunch.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Do you manage his work inbox?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: He received your last sixteen rejections.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Then I'll get straight to the point. I know he's not interested in foundation engineering, and he knows that I have no interest in 'proposals' outside of work.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Speaking of lunch, though...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Have you changed your mind?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: It is, indeed, time for lunch.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Nasti flips through her toolbox, taking out a rectangular object wrapped in foil from underneath all the instruments and neatly-packed toolboxes.
Mercia's curiosity brings her closer. She wants to know what could make this enigmatic director of Rhine Lab decline the most luxurious course at Cloud, the park's fine dining establishment.
A crack appears in her impeccable secretarial smile, however, as she watches Nasti impassively unwrap the object.
Is this... brick... your lunch?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Mumbles) Ration bar.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Mercia cannot look away from the 'brick'.
Are you hungry? Would you like a bite?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I... I suppose. Thank you...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Chews with great difficulty)
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Swallows arduously)
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: *cough* *cough*!
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You didn't have to say yes.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The Second Rule of Secretaries: Never decline an offer from your boss's guest, for even the smallest trifle might sour a relationship.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: How many rules are there?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Mr. Tannen gave me a booklet that is two centimeters thick.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: However, the most important one, and the one that I memorized first, was—
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Do whatever it takes to carry out your orders, for no one will listen to your excuses.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Don't force yourself to eat it.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Thank goodness... I mean, thank you for the hospitality.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I have a rule of my own, although it's a bit simpler.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I was born in Kazdel. The first rule I learned there is that food is precious, and no one may lie before it.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You're holding my lunch, Mercia, so kindly tell me the truth.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: What exactly does Mr. Tannen want to 'discuss' with me?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Reporting in! The core concept of this project is a perfect combination of zero-G simulation and wine tasting by substituting gravity with centrifugal force. 'You may spin, but your wine won't!'
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: Come to the Lucky Cystybeast floating revolving bar, where it's not just the wine that makes your head spin—
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: No need to read me the marketing copy. I'm just here to assess and ask questions from an engineering perspective.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Where's the other tester? Any feedback after the rectifications?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: *Vomit*...
attributes.name: Tester B

attributes.content: He didn't sleep well last night! We passed the re-check, didn't we, Mr. Jagger? We won't have our permit revoked?
The Lucky Cystybeast's floating revolving bar does not meet requirements, whether based on engineering reports or tester feedback.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: We would love to solve the technical issue of unstable power supply, but we need time...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: You had three days, in accordance with the rules of Propeller Paradise.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: But it takes at least five days for the developers to discuss a solution!
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Propeller Paradise has as many corporations as there are cars on the crossroads of Trimounts Square. Every driver has somewhere to be, but no one pleads to the traffic lights.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: There must be another way... I know! We hired close to a hundred testers. We could fire them and hire more researchers with the money!
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: But you promised us yesterday—
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: Shut up!
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: I've reviewed the registration details for Lucky Cystybeast.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You were a grocer in a small town. You lack the professional knowledge for levitation technology research, even if the banks have relaxed the loan criteria for businesses in the aerial sector.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: We stand upon Terra's first and only floating plate. Everything here must be worthy of it.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Please, don't tear off that ticket, I put my life savings into the Lucky Cystybeast, please...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: That's it?
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: I'll be back to cleaning Trimounts office building windows in a couple of days?
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: *Vomit*...
attributes.name: Tester B

attributes.content: Go on, barf your heart out. At least we got a taste of life in the sky... you won't have anything to throw up when you get back to the frontier, back to the cold and hunger.
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: Skip the technical inspections before the opening? Absolutely not.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Everyone on Propeller Paradise is racing against the clock to get across the finish line. Mr. Tannen believes that any delay to projects caused by inspections will compromise Propeller Paradise's opening.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: In addition, reducing the amount of communication you have to conduct with other tech firms will allow you to devote more of your time to your Rhine Lab research. Mr. Tannen has your best interests at heart.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: My best interests?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I spent years wandering the frontier when I first came to Columbia, building houses for the Pioneer Teams and killing bandits for the caravans. Life was hard until I finally got my big break.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: If I had someone like Gordon Tannen with my best interests at heart, handling everything I wasn't comfortable with...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: That would have been very fortunate, I'm sure.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I would have died out there in the wilderness, I'm sure.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Besides, what he really wants isn't for Rhine to forfeit our control over technical inspections.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: How do you know?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You imitate his negotiating style too well. The traps and pitfalls are obvious.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I'm not a Cautus. I'm not in the habit of diving into holes.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Spit it out. What does he really want?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You are as astute and decisive as he said you were.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: In that case, I'm sure you understand that, while Mr. Tannen is in charge of Propeller Paradise's overall administration, it is Rhine that has a stranglehold on public opinion.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: He doesn't need any accidents at such a critical juncture, nor can he afford one. Therefore, he has put together a list based on project progress, and asks that you perform the inspections in this order.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: This way, at least the inspections will have a minimal impact on the progress of individual projects, and minimize the chance of conflict, setting aside the issue of engineering control.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The less hassle for you, the less hassle for him.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I won't try to speculate about Tannen's intentions with the order. We have a compromise.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Give me the list.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Thank you for your understanding, Director Lunorey. I won't trouble you any longer.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: One last question. Which rule were you following in the negotiation just now?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The twelfth: Know your boss, and communicate his intentions with absolute faithfulness when negotiating, for you are his personal representative.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: However—
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Yes?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Before I came, Mr. Tannen stressed how difficult the head of Rhine Lab's Engineering Section was.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: I packed blankets because I thought I might have to spend the night in front of your office.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: But that's not what I see. You don't need concern from other people, and you're used to cutting through the problem in the most direct possible way. But you still care about people.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Which is why I now have the time to enjoy my lunch in peace, something that I have not done in a long time.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Mercia
